nasb.text: Therefore thus says the Lord, “Behold, I am going to plead your case And exact full vengeance for you; And I will dry up her sea And make her fountain dry.

esv.text: Therefore thus says the Lord: “Behold, I will plead your cause and take vengeance for you. I will dry up her sea and make her fountain dry,

cnv.text: 因此，耶和華這樣說： “看哪！我必為你的案件申訴， 為你報仇； 我必使巴比倫的河水枯竭， 使它們的水源乾涸。

ccb.text: 耶和华说： “我的子民啊， 我要为你们申冤， 替你们报仇； 我要使巴比伦的江河枯竭， 泉源干涸。
